title: bupleurum aristatum var. humile
intro: Bupleurum aristatum var. humile, also known as dwarf bupleurum, is a perennial herb that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum aristatum var. humile include reducing fever, alleviating anxiety and depression, and improving liver function. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations can also be found in capsule or tablet form.
